formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive loss plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive loss + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus changes in working capital equals Net cash provided by operating activities
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + Losses on investments in non-affiliates + Deferred income taxes + Acquisition termination cost + Other - Accounts receivable + Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Proceeds from maturities plus Proceeds from sales minus Purchases of marketable securities minus Purchases of PP and E minus Acquisitions minus Investments and other net equals Net cash from investing
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Investments and other, net
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities

formulas.formula: Proceeds from employee stock plans minus Tax withholding minus Dividends minus Principal payments minus Share repurchases equals Net cash from financing
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets - Payments related to repurchases of common stock
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: Net cash from operating plus investing plus financing equals Change in cash
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash and cash equivalents

formulas.formula: Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
components: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period + Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative plus Acquisition termination cost equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Income from operations
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other net equals Other income expense net
Income from operations plus Other income expense net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive loss plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus changes in working capital equals Net cash provided by operating activities

Proceeds from maturities plus Proceeds from sales minus Purchases of marketable securities minus Purchases of PP and E minus Acquisitions minus Investments and other net equals Net cash from investing
Proceeds from employee stock plans minus Tax withholding minus Dividends minus Principal payments minus Share repurchases equals Net cash from financing
Net cash from operating plus investing plus financing equals Change in cash
Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
